title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Kesari Tours

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Kesari Tours
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Kesari Tours in Howrah is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kesari Tours:
Kesari Tours is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kesari Tours!
